questions.stem: Tom ___ his room every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常習慣，所以要用現在式，Tom 是第三人稱單數，因此用 cleans。

questions.stem: We ___ baseball after school.
questions.explanation: after school 表示平常的活動，主詞是 we，所以用現在式原形 play。

questions.stem: I ___ milk every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示經常發生的事，主詞是 I，所以用現在式 drink。

questions.stem: My sister ___ her bike on Sundays.
questions.explanation: on Sundays 表示固定習慣，My sister 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 rides。

questions.stem: They ___ English songs at night.
questions.explanation: at night 這裡表示平常晚上會做的事，主詞是 they，所以用 sing。

questions.stem: Ben ___ his homework after dinner.
questions.explanation: after dinner 表示每天晚餐後的習慣，Ben 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 does。

questions.stem: The dogs ___ in the park every afternoon.
questions.explanation: every afternoon 表示經常發生的事，主詞是複數 dogs，所以用 run。

questions.stem: Lisa ___ a picture every weekend.
questions.explanation: every weekend 表示固定習慣，Lisa 是第三人稱單數，所以用 draws。

questions.stem: We ___ to the library on Saturdays.
questions.explanation: on Saturdays 表示平常每週六的習慣，主詞是 we，所以用 go。

questions.stem: Dad ___ breakfast for us every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，Dad 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 makes。

questions.stem: My friends ___ under the big tree at lunch time.
questions.explanation: at lunch time 表示平常午餐時間的習慣，主詞是複數 friends，所以用 sit。

questions.stem: The teacher ___ stories in class every week.
questions.explanation: every week 表示規律發生的事，The teacher 是第三人稱單數，所以用 tells。

questions.stem: Yesterday Tom ___ his room.
questions.explanation: Yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 clean 的過去式 cleaned。

questions.stem: We ___ baseball after school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 played。

questions.stem: I ___ milk this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 在這裡表示今天早上已經發生的事，所以用 drank。

questions.stem: My sister ___ her bike last Sunday.
questions.explanation: last Sunday 表示過去，因此用 ride 的過去式 rode。

questions.stem: They ___ English songs last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 sang。

questions.stem: Ben ___ his homework two hours ago.
questions.explanation: two hours ago 表示過去，因此要用 did。

questions.stem: The dogs ___ in the park yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: yesterday afternoon 表示過去，所以用 ran。

questions.stem: Lisa ___ a picture last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 表示過去，因此用 drew。

questions.stem: We ___ to the library yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 went。

questions.stem: Dad ___ breakfast for us this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，所以要用 made。

questions.stem: My friends ___ under the big tree yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以用 sat。

questions.stem: The teacher ___ a story in class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 told。

questions.stem: Mom ___ the window last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 opened。

questions.stem: The boy ___ the heavy box yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，carry 的過去式是 carried。

questions.stem: Amy ___ her grandma last week.
questions.explanation: last week 表示過去，所以要用 visited。

questions.stem: The baby ___ for water a minute ago.
questions.explanation: a minute ago 表示過去，因此要用 cried。

questions.stem: We ___ TV last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以用 watched。

questions.stem: Grandpa ___ me a funny joke yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 told。
